name: Jon Weber
abstract: Jon Weber (born 1961, Milwaukee, Wisconsin) is a New York City and Chicago-based jazz pianist and composer  whose compositions and performances have met critical and popular acclaim in many countries around the world. Largely self-taught, Weber has perfect pitch and remarkable melodic recall.

interviews.title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
